demographics.living_situation: lives at home; an adult child is present and helping tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I literally cannot lift my legs to get out of this chair, and my head feels like it's going to explode with pressure.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last three days I've got so weak I can't stand up tonight, and I've got a pounding headache and my home blood pressure machine gave a really high reading this evening.

symptom_narrative.onset: the weakness has been getting worse over the past three days and tonight I can't get out of the chair at all; the rounder face, weight gain around my middle and easy bruising have crept up over recent months
symptom_narrative.duration: about 72 hours for the sharp worsening; the body changes over several months
symptom_narrative.character: heavy, weak legs and arms so I can't push up from sitting or climb stairs, and a pounding pressure-like headache
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the weakness is the worst it has ever been - I'm completely stuck in the chair, and the headache feels like my head could burst
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: hips, thighs and shoulders for the weakness; a whole-head pressure for the headache
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand up or climb the stairs
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a very high reading on the home blood pressure machine, feeling agitated and moody and not myself for the last couple of days, and bruising very easily
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no sudden episode like this before, although the weakness and the body changes have slowly built up over months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot get out of the chair, climb stairs or walk safely without help; frightened of falling

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with an adult child present and helping; high fall risk tonight, and there are loose rugs on the floor in the living area

objective_data_offered.value: 190/110 on our home blood pressure machine earlier this evening
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff; may be unreliable and was not repeated

objective_data_offered.value: her face looks rounder and puffier than it used to over recent months, with the weight going to her middle and noticeably thinner arms and legs
lots of easy bruises on her forearms and thin, fragile-looking skin, and broad purple stretch marks across her tummy
she cannot push herself up out of the chair or stand without being steadied by two people
